arts.ttl: BREAKING: Liverpool boss Arne Slot responds to Real Madrid bid for Trent Alexander-Arnold
arts.sum: Real Madrid made an approach for the Liverpool right-back on New Year's Eve, but the Reds rejected it out of hand and remain hopeful he will sign a new contract

arts.ttl: Trent Alexander-Arnold's two demands and second Real Madrid bid leaves Liverpool with headache
arts.sum: Trent Alexander-Arnold's Liverpool contract is winding down and he's made his demands for staying with Real Madrid waiting in the wings - but will not break the bank for the player

arts.ttl: From Marca: Real Madrid to up offer to secure Trent Alexander-Arnold from Liverpool now
arts.sum: On Thursday, AS reported Real Madrid are willing to raise their offer from €10m to €15m for Trent Alexander-Arnold but won’t meet the €25m requested by Liverpool in the winter market. The Champions League winners would have changed their stance quickly on signing the Liverpool star in January. arts.ttl: Real Madrid Predicted Lineup vs. Valencia: La Liga
arts.sum: Real Madrid can go top of the La Liga standings with a win against Valencia on Jan. 3.

arts.ttl: Man Utd transfer news: Real Madrid ready £50m offer as Ten Hag favourite nears exit
arts.sum: Manchester United could be about to field a serious transfer offer from Real Madrid as their pursuit of Trent Alexander-Arnold takes a twist, while an Erik ten Hag favourite is on the move

arts.ttl: Managing Madrid Podcast: Kiyan’s Annual New Year’s Mailbag: TAA, Xabi Alonso, Davies, Real Madrid Predictions
arts.sum: On this episode of the Managing Madrid Podcast, Kiyan Sobhani answers questions like: Which Real Madrid legend would fit best with this team if we were to bring them back?

arts.ttl: Valencia vs Real Madrid: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Previewing Real Madrid's trip to Valencia on Friday, including team news, predictions and how to watch on TV.

arts.ttl: Trent Alexander-Arnold 'makes two demands' for new Liverpool contract as Real Madrid ponder £20.7m move
arts.sum: Liverpool defender Trent Alexander-Arnold reportedly makes two demands of the Reds if he is to snub Real Madrid and sign a new deal at Anfield.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid possible starting lineup against Valencia in LaLiga
arts.sum: Courtois will start in goal and in defence, Ancelotti will stick with Camavinga at left back after the solid game he had against Sevilla. The game between Valencia - Real Madrid will be played on Friday January 3 at Mestalla with kick off at 3:00 p.m. ET / 12:00 p.m. PT .
